title: Dyenamics and Friends
description: Adds compatibility between the new colors from Dyenamics and a bunch of other mods
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5SMDy8RU/images/cfddbde5b61670d20ebeb804be87b8c88ec87856.png)

Adds compatibility between the new colors from [Dyenamics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dyenamics) and a bunch of other mods.

> 0 mixins and 0 hard dependencies (Except for Dyenamics). Blocks are dynamically registered based on what compatible mods you have installed and if you remove this mod or a compat mod, the blocks just go away like any normal uninstall.

Current compatibility is listed below with many more planned.

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create): Seats and Sails

[Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture): Curtains, Stools, Tall stools, Lamp and Sofas

[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark): Framed Glass, Framed Glass Panes, Shingles, Shingles Slabs, Shingles Stairs and Glass Shards (from breaking Dyenamics stained glass)

[Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts): Hammocks and Sleeping Bags

[OpenBlocks Elevator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/openblocks-elevator): Elevators

[Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted): Cushion and Sheets to adorn chairs, couches, beds and benches

[Furnish](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnish-furnitures): Amphoras, Plates, Paper Lamps, Showcases, Sofas as well as carpets on stairs and trapdoors

[Botany Pots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botany-pots): Botany pots, Concrete Botany pots and Glazed Terracotta Botany pots

[Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized): Crystal Glass, Crystal Glass Pane

[Ceramics](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized): Porcelain, Terracotta Cistern, Porcelain Cistern

[Clayworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clayworks): Terracotta Wall, Terracotta Slab, Terracotta Vertical Slab, Terracotta Stairs, Terracotta Bricks, Terracotta Brick Wall, Terracotta Brick Slab, Terracotta Brick Vertical Slab, Chiseled Terracotta Bricks

[Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone): Big Candles, String Curtain

[Come to Discord](https://discord.gg/69YVMbvhTC) if you have suggestions for more compat stuff
